sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei hong panpih kei lecin on Koi lam ka zuan diam?
zingsang khuavak Bang ci'n tho in ka muak thei diam?
Nong hehpihna tawh ka nung pan nong sam sam hi
Nang tawh I ki nai hang in Topa kong mu thei kei hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (Na migit na kei hong musak in
Na hihna bang hong mu sak in)2
Na hih na bang taktak in.
